channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Canada defeats France 6-1 in pre-tournament exhibition ahead of 2026 world championship
item.description: Canada opened its pre-tournament schedule for the 2026 world hockey championship with a decisive 6-1 exhibition victory over France in Paris. Leading the way was Macklin Celebrini, the San Jose Sharks...

item.title: Southern Gauteng and Western Province claim South African Hockey IPT titles
item.description: The 2026 South African Hockey Interprovincial Tournament (IPT) wrapped up in thrilling fashion at the University of Johannesburg, with Southern Gauteng and Western Province emerging as national champi...

item.title: PNP reports decline in major crimes following intensified anti-criminality operations
item.description: Bumaba ng 12% ang bilang ng mga pangunahing krimen sa buong bansa, ayon sa datos ng Philippine National Police (PNP), kasunod ng pinaigting na anti-criminality operations sa mga high-risk areas. Sa mo...

item.title: Philippine Coast Guard warns of potential rocket debris near Zambales
item.description: The Philippine Coast Guard (PCG) announced a warning regarding the potential fall of debris from a Chinese Long March 7 rocket. The rocket is scheduled for launch this morning from the Wenchang Space ...

item.title: Trump Says US Military Has Hit 70% of Iran Targets and Could Complete the Rest in Two Weeks
item.description: US President Donald Trump don talk say e go take only two weeks for American military to strike every single target wey dem get for Iran. For one interview wey dem air on Sunday with journalist Sharyl...

item.title: Otile Brown and Senator Karen Nyamu Seen Sharing Friendly Moment at Birthday Party
item.description: Kenyan singer Otile Brown and nominated senator Karen Nyamu have grabbed attention online after a video showing them sharing a cosy moment at a private birthday party went viral. The party, held by Ah...

item.title: Kaizer Chiefs clinch third spot and CAF Confederation Cup qualification after late goals against Sekhukhune
item.description: Kaizer Chiefs have officially booked their place in the CAF Confederation Cup following a dramatic 2-0 victory over Sekhukhune United at Peter Mokaba Stadium on Sunday evening. The Amakhosi ended a fi...

item.title: Starmer's leadership faces internal Labour Party challenges after election losses
item.description: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer has declared his intention to lead the U.K. for a full decade, signalling he hopes to win the next general election and serve a second term. However, his position i...

item.title: Claudia Winkleman briefly attends TV BAFTAs with husband Kris Thykier after Celebrity Traitors filming
item.description: Claudia Winkleman, the 54-year-old television presenter, made a rare public appearance with her husband, Kris Thykier, at the TV BAFTA Awards on Sunday. She had been filming the latest series of Celeb...

item.title: Tamil Series 'Exam' Explores Corruption in Entrance Tests
item.description: The Tamil series 'Exam', directed by A Sarkunam, is set to premiere on Prime Video from May 15. The show stars Dushara Vijayan, Aditi Balan, and Abbas, and delves into the controversial world of entra...

item.title: Iran Delivers Response to US Ceasefire Proposal Amid Drone Attacks on Gulf Shipping and Airspace
item.description: Iran has formally replied to the latest US ceasefire proposal through Pakistani mediators, emphasizing the need for a permanent end to the conflict on all fronts, including Lebanon, and improved secur...

item.title: Pakistan receives Iran's official reply to American peace plan for Middle East via mediator role
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif has confirmed that Pakistan received Iran's response to a United States proposal for ending the war in the Middle East. The Prime Minister stated that Field Marshal Asim ...

item.title: Security concerns rise for Delhi district judges amid increasing threats and limited protection
item.description: The safety of district court judges in Delhi has emerged as a serious concern, with many judicial officers reportedly facing threats, intimidation, and harassment while having minimal or no security c...

item.title: Iran and U.S. Exchange Ceasefire Proposals Amid Gulf Drone Incidents
item.description: Iran has formally responded to the United States' latest ceasefire proposal through Pakistani mediators, emphasising that negotiations should focus on ending the ongoing conflict comprehensively, incl...

item.title: Alex Eala eliminated from Italian Open by Elena Rybakina
item.description: Filipino tennis rising star Alex Eala has been eliminated from the 2026 Italian Open after a tough match against Kazakhstan's Elena Rybakina. Despite a strong effort, Eala was unable to overcome Rybak...

item.title: Government Blacklists 52 Construction Firms Amid Widespread Noncompliance
item.description: The South African construction sector is facing serious challenges, with the government recently blacklisting 52 contractors due to fraud, poor performance, and contractual failures. This move exposes...

item.title: Puerto Galera hosts race to raise funds for Mangyan Iraya students' education
item.description: In Puerto Galera, hundreds of participants came together to take part in a community race aimed at supporting the education of Mangyan Iraya students. The event highlighted the growing awareness and c...

item.title: Two Indian Crew Members Safe Amid Hantavirus Outbreak on MV Hondius
item.description: Two Indian nationals travelling as crew on the MV Hondius, which recently experienced a hantavirus outbreak, have been confirmed by the Indian embassy in Spain to be asymptomatic and in good health. T...

item.title: Protesters and Politicians Rally Against Antisemitism in London
item.description: Thousands gathered outside Downing Street in London to protest against antisemitism, following a series of violent incidents including arson attacks at Jewish sites and a double stabbing in Golders Gr...

item.title: Giant fruit bats observed in well-preserved Apayao forests
item.description: A rare colony of giant fruit bats, locally known as flying foxes, was recently observed in the forests of Flora town, Apayao, according to the Department of Environment and Natural Resources (DENR). T...
